session.user: Run pytest on tests/unit/cli/test_json_output.py -v and report results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what passes and fails. Include the full test output.
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on the specified test file and report the results without making any modifications.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on test_json_output.py with verbose output
